from enum import Enum


class UserStatus(str, Enum):
    ACTIVE = "active"
    INACTIVE = "inactive"
    SUSPENDED = "suspended"


class PaymentStatus(str, Enum):
    PENDING = "pending"
    COMPLETED = "completed"
    FAILED = "failed"


class OrderState(str, Enum):
    CREATED = "created"
    PROCESSING = "processing"
    SHIPPED = "shipped"
    DELIVERED = "delivered"


class ErrorCode(str, Enum):
    AUTH_ERROR = "E001"
    AUTHZ_ERROR = "E002"
    VALIDATION_ERROR = "E003"


def get_user_status(user: dict) -> str:
    if user["status"] == UserStatus.ACTIVE:
        return "User is active"
    elif user["status"] == UserStatus.INACTIVE:
        return "User is inactive"
    elif user["status"] == UserStatus.SUSPENDED:
        return "User is suspended"
    return "Unknown status"


def process_payment(status: PaymentStatus) -> dict:
    if status == PaymentStatus.PENDING:
        return {"action": "wait"}
    elif status == PaymentStatus.COMPLETED:
        return {"action": "confirm"}
    elif status == PaymentStatus.FAILED:
        return {"action": "retry"}
    return {"action": "unknown"}


def handle_order_state(state: OrderState) -> str:
    if state == OrderState.CREATED:
        return "Order created"
    elif state == OrderState.PROCESSING:
        return "Order processing"
    elif state == OrderState.SHIPPED:
        return "Order shipped"
    elif state == OrderState.DELIVERED:
        return "Order delivered"
    return "Unknown state"
